title: Craftable Tridents
description: This Is A Simple Datapack That Adds The Possibilty To Craft Tridents
body:
Tridents are such a cool item, but they are so hard to find and maybe even not worth it.
This datapack adds a crafting recipe to easily obtain them.


![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20043daf155e085d6e399b48d5d14e162b94cefc.png)
